heading: Submission of determinations to President
label: 42306 Submission of determinations to President
text: Before a determination under becomes effective or a request is made under , the determination shall be submitted immediately to the President. The President, within 10 days after receiving it, may disapprove it in writing, setting forth the reasons for the disapproval, if the President finds that disapproval is required for reasons of national defense or foreign policy.section 42304 of this titlesection 42305 of this title
